EventError.description: Error thrown by function ValidateEvent on class EventValidator

paramName.description: The parameter that triggered the error throw

QueryParameterError.description: Error thrown by function ValidatePathParameter on class EventValidator

names.description: Array containing the string names of the parameters that triggered the error throw

OperationError.description: Error thrown when an invalid operation is performed

paramName.description: The name of the parameter that triggered the error throw

ModelValidationError.description: Error thrown when an invalid value is submited to a Model

MismatchedContextOrgError.description: Error thrown by a handler when request org and context org are mismatched

contextOrgKey.description: The string key of the context Org

orgKey.description: The string key of the request Org

path.description: The JSON path of the incorrect parameter

fieldName.description: The name of the field that triggered the error throw

value.description: The value of the field that triggered the error throw

ValidationError.description: Error thrown by a Validator when the body data is incorrectly structured

validationIssues.description: Array containing all ValidationIssue instances identified by the schema

RecordOutOfDateError.description: Error thrown by an Accessor when a record is out of date

TooManyResultsError.description: Error thrown when the number of records retrieved from the database exceeds the maximum number of Records per query

actualRecordsNum.description: The actual number of records retrieved from the database

threasholdNum.description: The threshold number of records that was exceeded

PermissionError.description: Error thrown by function ValidatePermissions on class EventValidator

AppAccessError.description: Error thrown by function ValidateAppAccess on class EventValidator
